source.crossCheck: Pump.fun confirmed the public top-holder set, then a live Token-2022 account scan prepared 100 on-curve ANSEM wallets. Finalized Solscan proof is attached for every batch.
source.rule: Top 100 normal wallet holders of The Black Bull / ANSEM received a tiered 1M PUMPR outreach drop.

source.crossCheck: Pump.fun top-holder rows were prepared from the live ANSEM holder list. Off-curve/program-style addresses were excluded; finalized Solscan transactions prove the PUMPR send.
source.rule: Top normal wallet holders of The Black Bull / ANSEM received a small PUMPR outreach drop without changing the official PUMPR holder reward history.
